new_value: {"notes":"Rust .48.2 review also identified C parity work for this bead: lichen/subsys/lichen/oscore/oscore.c ordinary responses are repeatable with same request nonce; fresh-PIV responses do not reserve/update notification replay state; request KID is parsed but not bound to recipient ID; coap_client.c discards response OSCORE option and always passes empty, blocking fresh-PIV notifications. Add these to C OSCORE acceptance and Linux .59.1 matrix; no AWS source work attempted."}
